about.label: Our Story
about.title: Meet Jerry — The Owner of Cali Roofing Solutions
about.description: A trusted name in roofing services with years of hands-on expertise. As a fully licensed roofing contractor, Jerry's commitment to craftsmanship and customer satisfaction sets his company apart. Specializing in roof replacement, repair, and maintenance, Jerry personally oversees each project to ensure it meets the highest standards.

feature1.title: The Best Local Roofers
feature1.description: Roofing can get messy so we take the proper precautions to avoid rogue nails, landscaping damage, and unsightly appearances.

feature2.title: Professional Roofing Services
feature2.description: We utilize the latest technology from drone inspections to curb appeal visualizers.

feature3.title: Customer Satisfaction
feature3.description: If you have a roofing emergency, reach out to us and we'll ensure a prompt response within 24 hours.

feature4.title: Licensed Roofing Contractors
feature4.description: Every roof includes a workmanship warranty backed by our maintenance program.
